changeSet.author: migration-team
changeSet.comment: Add unique constraint on (project_id, measure_type) in pafs_core_nfm_measures. Removes any duplicate rows (keeping the highest id) then adds a unique constraint. The existing single-column idx_nfm_measures_project_id index is dropped because the new compound unique index covers project_id as a left-prefix lookup. idx_nfm_measures_type is retained for queries filtered by measure_type alone.
